notes: The requirements-gap ledger path referenced by repo guidance does not exist in this checkout, so the pass used the owning spec plus generated audit outputs instead.
Only S19P8 has live implementation/test evidence in this chunk; S19P6, S19P7, S19P9, S19P10, and S19P11 remain greenfield.
The generated inventory snapshot was not regenerated in this pass and still reflects the pre-rewrite legacy STREAM tags.
